results.rendered_html:
lubdha p. p. [lubh-kta]
1 Greedy, covetous, avaricious.
2 Desirous of, longing for, greedy of; as in dhanalubdha, māṃsalubdha, guṇalubdha &c.
— bdhaḥ
1 A hunter.
2 A libertine, lecher.
